title: Off-by-one reasoning
feedback: Check whether the final boundary is included and whether counting starts at zero.

title: Print versus return
feedback: Printing displays a value; returning sends it back to the caller.

title: Accumulator reset inside loop
feedback: Check whether the accumulator is created before the loop or reset during each iteration.

title: Data-type confusion
feedback: Inspect the types involved before combining or comparing values.

title: Mutation versus copying
feedback: Check whether two names refer to the same object or to independent copies.

title: Boolean condition confusion
feedback: Evaluate each condition separately before combining them.

title: DataFrame filtering confusion
feedback: Separate the row condition from the column selection.
